commands: vp pm pack --json # should pack current workspace root
vp pm pack --recursive --json && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack all packages in workspace (uses --workspaces)
vp pm pack --filter app --json && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack specific package (uses --workspace app)
vp pm pack --filter app --filter @vite-plus-test/utils --json && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack multiple packages
vp pm pack --pack-destination ./dist --json && rm -rf ./dist # should pack with destination
